004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.microservice.tomcat;
018
019import java.time.*;
020
021/**
022 * Programmatic settings for the embedded Tomcat server contributed by {@link TomcatConfiguration}.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 * Users who need to override the defaults pulled from <c>Config</c> / <c>ManifestFile</c> should
026 * contribute a <c>@Bean TomcatSettings</c> from their own <c>@Configuration</c> class.  Any value
027 * left {@code null} on this settings bean falls back to the corresponding <c>Config</c> / <c>ManifestFile</c>
028 * entry, then to a hard-coded default.
029 *
030 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
031 * <p class='bjava'>
032 *    <ja>@Configuration</ja>
033 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyAppConfig {
034 *       <ja>@Bean</ja>
035 *       <jk>public</jk> TomcatSettings tomcatSettings() {
036 *          <jk>return</jk> TomcatSettings.<jsm>create</jsm>()
037 *             .ports(8080, 0)
038 *             .build();
039 *       }
040 *    }
041 * </p>
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
044 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauMicroserviceTomcat">juneau-microservice-tomcat Basics</a>
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * @since 10.0.0
048 */
049public class TomcatSettings {
050
051   /**
052    * Builder for {@link TomcatSettings}.
053    */
054   public static class Builder {
055
056      int[] ports;
057      String baseDir;
058      Duration stopTimeout;
059      Duration shutdownSettleDelay;
060
061      Builder() {}
062
063      /**
064       * Builds a new {@link TomcatSettings} from this builder.
065       *
066       * @return A new settings instance.
067       */
068      public TomcatSettings build() {
069         return new TomcatSettings(this);
070      }
071
072      /**
073       * Specifies the ports to try when binding the Tomcat server.
074       *
075       * <p>
076       * The first available port is used.  A value of <c>0</c> indicates "try a random port".  When set, this
077       * value takes precedence over the <c>Tomcat/port</c> config-file entry and the <c>Tomcat-Port</c>
078       * manifest entry.
079       *
080       * @param value The candidate ports, in priority order.  Can be <jk>null</jk> to defer to config / manifest.
081       * @return This object.
082       */
083      public Builder ports(int...value) {
084         ports = value;
085         return this;
086      }
087
088      /**
089       * Specifies the Catalina base directory used by the embedded Tomcat server for its work files.
090       *
091       * <p>
092       * When set, the {@link TomcatServerFactory} uses this directory as both the Catalina base and the root
093       * context doc-base, and the directory is left in place after the server stops.  When not set, the
094       * {@link TomcatServerComponent} creates a fresh temp directory on start-up and deletes it on stop.
095       *
096       * @param value The absolute or relative path to the base directory.  Can be <jk>null</jk> to use an
097       *    auto-created temp directory.
098       * @return This object.
099       */
100      public Builder baseDir(String value) {
101         baseDir = value;
102         return this;
103      }
104
105      /**
106       * Specifies the bounded graceful-shutdown drain timeout for the Tomcat server.
107       *
108       * <p>
109       * On stop, the connector is paused (stops accepting new requests) and the component waits up to this
110       * duration for in-flight requests to complete before the server stops.  When set, this value takes
111       * precedence over the <c>Tomcat/stopTimeout</c> config-file entry (in milliseconds).  When neither is set,
112       * a default of {@code 30s} is applied.
113       *
114       * @param value The drain timeout.  Can be <jk>null</jk> to defer to config, then to the default.
115       * @return This object.
116       */
117      public Builder stopTimeout(Duration value) {
118         stopTimeout = value;
119         return this;
120      }
121
122      /**
123       * Specifies the settle delay applied between flipping the readiness probe out of service and stopping the
124       * connector.
125       *
126       * <p>
127       * On stop, the readiness probe ({@code /readyz}) flips to {@code 503} <i>before</i> the connector is paused
128       * so a load balancer / Kubernetes stops routing new traffic.  This brief delay gives the load balancer time
129       * to observe the {@code 503} before in-flight requests are drained.  When set, this value takes precedence
130       * over the <c>Tomcat/shutdownSettleDelay</c> config-file entry (in milliseconds).  When neither is set, no
131       * settle delay is applied (defaults to {@code 0}) &mdash; the recommended Kubernetes pattern is a
132       * {@code preStop} hook sleep instead.
133       *
134       * @param value The settle delay.  Can be <jk>null</jk> to defer to config, then to the default.
135       * @return This object.
136       */
137      public Builder shutdownSettleDelay(Duration value) {
138         shutdownSettleDelay = value;
139         return this;
140      }
141   }
142
143   /**
144    * Creates a new builder for this object.
145    *
146    * @return A new builder.
147    */
148   public static Builder create() {
149      return new Builder();
150   }
151
152   private final int[] ports;
153   private final String baseDir;
154   private final Duration stopTimeout;
155   private final Duration shutdownSettleDelay;
156
157   TomcatSettings(Builder b) {
158      ports = b.ports;
159      baseDir = b.baseDir;
160      stopTimeout = b.stopTimeout;
161      shutdownSettleDelay = b.shutdownSettleDelay;
162   }
163
164   /**
165    * Returns the candidate ports to try when binding the Tomcat server, in priority order.
166    *
167    * @return The ports, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
168    */
169   public int[] getPorts() {
170      return ports == null ? null : ports.clone();
171   }
172
173   /**
174    * Returns the Catalina base directory to use when building the Tomcat server.
175    *
176    * @return The base directory path, or <jk>null</jk> if not set (an auto-created temp directory is used).
177    */
178   public String getBaseDir() {
179      return baseDir;
180   }
181
182   /**
183    * Returns the bounded graceful-shutdown drain timeout for the Tomcat server.
184    *
185    * @return The drain timeout, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
186    */
187   public Duration getStopTimeout() {
188      return stopTimeout;
189   }
190
191   /**
192    * Returns the settle delay applied between flipping the readiness probe out of service and stopping the connector.
193    *
194    * @return The settle delay, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
195    */
196   public Duration getShutdownSettleDelay() {
197      return shutdownSettleDelay;
198   }
199}
